windows.transcript: decor purposes. But before I realized it, I had so many candles. There's
windows.embed_text_v2: display collection of dozens finished store-bought scented jar candles with patterned gold metal lids and colored waxes in glass jars piled on wooden table as intro reveal
windows.summary_v2: Intro montage showing a hoarded collection of finished store-bought jar candles with a 'Confession Time' overlay, not candle making.

tags_v2.setting: wooden tabletop with assorted store-bought candles

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view of a tabletop crowded with dozens of finished store-bought jar candles with patterned metal lids in gold, silver, and bronze tones.
Extreme close-up on a single gold glitter/star-confetti candle lid, image is blurred.
Same blurred glitter lid surface, camera shifting slightly across the tin top.
Close-up sweep across glitter encrusted lid, gold and silver stars visible in soft focus.
Glitter lid centered with overlay text 'Confession Time' burned in over the image.
Same glitter candle lid with 'Confession Time' overlay; pulled back slightly so the rim of the jar is visible.
Blurred wider view of several candle lids with the 'Confession Time' overlay still visible centered on screen.
Clear wider shot of the candle collection on a wooden table: rows of jar candles with decorative gold lids and various colored waxes (red, blue, teal) visible through clear glass jars.
Low-angle close-up of a clear glass jar candle with bright red wax sitting on the wooden table beside other candles.

a candle is lit in a glass container
a red liquid in a glass on a table
a blend of water and watermells in a blender
seconds.transcript_text: and I want to combine it together

a bunch of silver cups sitting on top of a wooden table
how to make old coconut oil
how to melt candles in new candles

windows.embed_text: a glass with a liquid inside of it | a candle is lit in a glass container | a red liquid in a glass on a table | a blend of water and watermells in a blender | a table topped with a bunch of silver coins | a bunch of silver cups sitting on top of a wooden table | how to make old coconut oil | how to melt candles in new candles
windows.transcript: There's always those few millimeters of unusable wax at the bottom, and I want to combine it together to form a new candle. In this video, I'll show you how
windows.embed_text_v2: inspecting leftover red wax dregs in clear glass candle jars, panning a table of used candle tins and jars with decorative lids, finished poured candles, intro title card
windows.summary_v2: Intro montage inspecting leftover wax in used candle jars and a table of finished candles under a 'How to Melt Old Candles into New Candles' title card.

tags_v2.action: showing leftover wax in used candle jars
tags_v2.on_screen_text: How to Melt Old Candles into New Candles

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a clear glass jar holding a thin layer of leftover pink/red candle wax in the bottom; other used candle jars sit on a wood table nearby.
The same clear jar, now showing the solidified pink wax disc at the bottom with several short burnt wick stubs poking up.
Tighter view into the jar; the leftover red wax base with multiple old wick tabs is visible, the upper jar wall cloudy with wax film.
Camera looks down into a stack of glass plates/coasters submerged in pink wax inside the jar, the embossed disc patterns showing through the tinted layer.
Wide overhead shot of a wooden table crowded with two dozen used candle tins and jars, most capped with decorative metal lids, plus two clear votive glasses in front.
The table of leftover candle jars panned forward; foreground shows clear votive glasses with bits of old wax and a wick stub inside.
Title card 'How to Melt Old Candles into New Candles' fades in over rows of empty candle glasses and two finished candles at the bottom edge.
Title overlay 'How to Melt Old Candles into New Candles' fully displayed over a red and a cream finished candle and scattered wax scraps on a metal dish.
Title overlay still shown over four finished poured candles (red, cream, teal, white) viewed from above on the wooden table.
